hero.headline: A unified portal for all Delta schools
hero.deck: The Delta Schools platform bridges the gap between disparate platforms, providing a high-performance entry point for DAS, DILS, and DMLS schools.

ecosystem.title: Integrated Ecosystem
ecosystem.deck: Our hub provides direct access to the core pillars of our technical infrastructure. Each platform is optimised for specific organisational workflows.

das.label: DAS
das.body: Data Analytics Service provides advanced computational power to process complex datasets and generate actionable business intelligence.

dils.label: DILS
dils.body: Digital Integration Layer Systems manage the seamless communication between legacy databases and modern cloud applications.

dmls.label: DMLS
dmls.body: Dynamic Microservices Logistics handles the orchestration and scaling of containerised workloads across global regions.

governance.title: Unified Governance
governance.body: Our centralised authentication and permission model ensures that your transition between DAS, DILS, and DMLS is fluid and secure. Manage everything from a single administrative console.

cta.headline: Ready to optimise your infrastructure?
cta.deck: Join 500+ enterprises using CompilationHub as their primary service entry point.
